title: junellia erinacea
intro: Junellia erinacea is a species of flowering plant in the family Verbenaceae, commonly known as a shrub or small tree native to the Andes mountain range in South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Junellia erinacea include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and even lower blood pressure. Junellia erinacea can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
